name: Caitong Fund Management Co. LTD. - Sci and Tech Innovation Theme 3 Years Fund
summary: Caitong Fund Management Co. LTD. - Sci and Tech Innovation Theme 3 Years Fund is a fund managed by Caitong Fund Management that focuses on investing in companies involved in science and technology innovation, with a three-year investment horizon. The fund aims to capture the growth potential of the technology sector while managing risk through diversification.
